creator: finance@pacifictimesheet.com
text: Pacific Timesheet is web-based timesheet software that provides payroll, project, job costing, time and attendance features in one system. Other modules include automated approvals, billing and pay rates, time-off scheduling, custom reporting, iPhone timesheet, IVR integration, time clock integration and payroll integration. We support all major operating systems and browsers, and is available in licensed or ASP/online.
